driver_subject: pinctrl: mvebu: Switch to use DEFINE_NOIRQ_DEV_PM_OPS() helper
stage1_reason: All three commits involve switching to new kernel helper APIs: DEFINE_NOIRQ_DEV_PM_OPS() for PM callbacks, devm_platform_get_and_ioremap_resource() for resource mapping, and explicit DT includes cleanup due to header changes.
stage2_reason: Driver commit c9008b71bed6 directly adopts DEFINE_NOIRQ_DEV_PM_OPS() helper introduced in kernel commit 2a6c0b4777ae, matching exact API name and purpose.
